props.name: allowReordering
props.desc: Whether rows can be manually reordered by drag-and-drop.

props.name: customReorderEndpoint
props.desc: API URL called to persist row reorder operations.

props.name: dataFetchingMode
props.desc: How data is loaded: paged (server-side pagination) or lazy (load-on-scroll).

props.name: defaultPageSize
props.desc: Number of rows shown per page by default.

props.name: disableRefresh
props.desc: Prevent automatic data refresh when context dependencies change.

props.name: endpoint
props.desc: API URL used to fetch data (used when sourceType is 'Url').

props.name: entityType
props.desc: Fully-qualified entity type (e.g. 'Shesha.Core.Person'). Used when sourceType is 'Entity'.

props.name: grouping
props.desc: Grouping configuration applied to the data.

props.name: onAfterRowReorder
props.desc: Action triggered after a row has been successfully reordered.

props.name: onBeforeRowReorder
props.desc: Action triggered before a row reorder is committed. Can cancel the operation.

props.name: permanentFilter
props.desc: JSON Logic filter expression always applied to data queries (see jsonlogic.com).

props.name: sortMode
props.desc: 'standard' uses column header clicks; 'strict' uses a fixed sort defined by strictSortBy/Order.

props.name: sourceType
props.desc: Where the table data comes from.

props.name: standardSorting
props.desc: Default sort configuration (array of { propertyName, sort } objects).

props.name: strictSortBy
props.desc: Property name to sort by when sortMode is 'strict'.

props.name: strictSortOrder
props.desc: Sort direction when sortMode is 'strict': 0 = ascending, 1 = descending.

datatable.desc: Must be placed inside a dataContext component to receive data.

props.name: cellBorders
props.desc: Show borders between cells.

props.name: freezeHeaders
props.desc: Keep column headers visible when scrolling vertically.

props.name: hoverHighlight
props.desc: Highlight the row under the mouse cursor.

props.name: items
props.desc: Column definitions for the table.

props.name: noDataIcon
props.desc: Ant Design icon name shown in the empty-state placeholder.

props.name: noDataSecondaryText
props.desc: Secondary message shown below the no-data icon.

props.name: noDataText
props.desc: Primary message shown when the table has no rows.

props.name: onRowClick
props.desc: Action triggered when a row is clicked.

props.name: onRowDoubleClick
props.desc: Action triggered when a row is double-clicked.

props.name: onRowHover
props.desc: Action triggered when the mouse enters a row.

props.name: onRowSelect
props.desc: Action triggered when a row is selected via checkbox.

props.name: onSelectionChange
props.desc: Action triggered when the row selection changes.

props.name: responsiveMode
props.desc: How the table adapts on small screens.

props.name: rowDividers
props.desc: Show horizontal dividers between rows.

props.name: selectionMode
props.desc: Whether rows can be selected, and how many.

props.name: showExpandedView
props.desc: Show an expanded detail view when a row is clicked.

props.name: striped
props.desc: Apply alternating row background colours.

datalist.desc: Must be placed inside a dataContext component to receive data.

props.name: canAddInline
props.desc: Allow adding new items directly in the list.

props.name: canDeleteInline
props.desc: Allow deleting items directly in the list.

props.name: canEditInline
props.desc: Allow editing items directly in the list.

props.name: cardHeight
props.desc: Fixed height for each card (e.g. '120px').

props.name: cardMaxWidth
props.desc: Maximum card width (e.g. '400px').

props.name: cardMinWidth
props.desc: Minimum card width (e.g. '200px').

props.name: collapseByDefault
props.desc: Collapse grouped sections by default.

props.name: collapsible
props.desc: Allow grouped sections to be collapsed.

props.name: createFormId
props.desc: Form used when creating a new list item inline.

props.name: createFormType
props.desc: Form type hint for the create form (used with dynamic form selection).

props.name: customCreateUrl
props.desc: API URL for creating new items (overrides default).

props.name: customDeleteUrl
props.desc: API URL for deleting items (overrides default).

props.name: customListItemWidth
props.desc: Card width in pixels when listItemWidth is 'custom'.

props.name: customUpdateUrl
props.desc: API URL for updating items (overrides default).

props.name: datalistEmptyState
props.desc: Configuration for the empty-state placeholder shown when there are no items.

props.name: dblClickActionConfiguration
props.desc: Action to execute on item double-click.

props.name: formId
props.desc: Form used to render each list item.

props.name: formIdExpression
props.desc: Script that returns a form identifier for each item dynamically.

props.name: formSelectionMode
props.desc: How the item form is resolved.

props.name: formType
props.desc: Form type hint used when formSelectionMode is 'view'.

props.name: gap
props.desc: Gap between cards in pixels.

props.name: groupStyle
props.desc: Inline CSS applied to each group header.

props.name: inlineEditMode
props.desc: Whether one or all items can be edited simultaneously.

props.name: inlineSaveMode
props.desc: Whether inline edits are saved automatically or require a manual save action.

props.name: listItemWidth
props.desc: Card width: a number (columns) or 'custom' (uses customListItemWidth).

props.name: modalWidth
props.desc: Width of the inline edit modal (e.g. '600px' or '80%').

props.name: noDataText
props.desc: Primary message shown when the list has no items.

props.name: noDataSecondaryText
props.desc: Secondary message shown below the no-data icon.

props.name: noDataIcon
props.desc: Ant Design icon name shown in the empty-state placeholder.

props.name: onListItemClick
props.desc: Action triggered when a list item is clicked.

props.name: onListItemHover
props.desc: Action triggered when the mouse enters a list item.

props.name: onListItemSave
props.desc: Script called before saving an inline-edited item. Return the modified item data.

props.name: onListItemSaveSuccessAction
props.desc: Action to execute after a list item is saved successfully.

props.name: onListItemSelect
props.desc: Action triggered when a list item is selected.

props.name: onNewListItemInitialize
props.desc: Script called to initialise a new item's default values. Return the initial data object.

props.name: onRowDeleteSuccessAction
props.desc: Action to execute after an item is deleted successfully.

props.name: onRowSave
props.desc: Script called before saving an inline row. Return the modified row data.

props.name: onSelectionChange
props.desc: Action triggered when the selection changes.

props.name: orientation
props.desc: Direction cards are laid out.

props.name: selectionMode
props.desc: Whether items can be selected, and how many.

props.name: showBorder
props.desc: Show a border around each card.

props.name: showEditIcons
props.desc: Show edit/delete action icons on each card.

props.name: showSizeChanger
props.desc: Show a dropdown to change the page size.

props.name: showTotalItems
props.desc: Show the total record count next to the pager.

props.name: block
props.desc: Stretch the search input to fill its container.

props.name: separatorDisplay
props.desc: Show a visual separator between the search input and adjacent toolbar items.

props.name: filters
props.desc: Named saved filters shown as tabs or buttons in the selector.

props.name: persistSelectedFilters
props.desc: Remember the selected filter across page reloads.

props.name: showIcon
props.desc: Show an icon next to each filter label.

props.name: buttonType
props.desc: Visual style of the filter button.

props.name: icon
props.desc: Ant Design icon name shown on the filter button.
